From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This article is about the 1920 film. For 1936 film, see [The Amazing Quest of Ernest Bliss](/wiki/The_Amazing_Quest_of_Ernest_Bliss "The Amazing Quest of Ernest Bliss").

1920 British film

| The Amazing Quest of Mr. Ernest Bliss | |
| --- | --- |
| Directed by | [Henry Edwards](/wiki/Henry_Edwards_(actor) "Henry Edwards (actor)") |
| Written by | [E. Phillips Oppenheim](/wiki/E._Phillips_Oppenheim "E. Phillips Oppenheim") |
| Starring | Henry Edwards |
| Production company | [Hepworth Pictures](/wiki/Hepworth_Pictures "Hepworth Pictures") |
| Distributed by | Imperial |
| Release date | * 1920 (1920) |
| Country | United Kingdom |
| Languages | Silent English intertitles |

***The Amazing Quest of Mr. Ernest Bliss*** is a 1920 British [silent](/wiki/Silent_film "Silent film") [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by and starring [Henry Edwards](/wiki/Henry_Edwards_(actor) "Henry Edwards (actor)"). As of August 2010, the film is listed as one of the [British Film Institute](/wiki/British_Film_Institute "British Film Institute")'s "[75 Most Wanted](/wiki/BFI_75_Most_Wanted "BFI 75 Most Wanted")" [lost films](/wiki/Lost_film "Lost film").[[1]](#cite_note-BFI-1) The film was [remade in 1936](/wiki/The_Amazing_Quest_of_Ernest_Bliss "The Amazing Quest of Ernest Bliss") starring [Cary Grant](/wiki/Cary_Grant "Cary Grant").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=The_Amazing_Quest_of_Mr._Ernest_Bliss&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Henry Edwards](/wiki/Henry_Edwards_(actor) "Henry Edwards (actor)") as Ernest Bliss
* [Chrissie White](/wiki/Chrissie_White "Chrissie White") as Frances Clayton
* [Gerald Ames](/wiki/Gerald_Ames "Gerald Ames") as Dorrington
* [Mary Dibley](/wiki/Mary_Dibley "Mary Dibley") as Kate Brent
* [Reginald Bach](/wiki/Reginald_Bach "Reginald Bach") as Jack Brent
* [Henry Vibart](/wiki/Henry_Vibart "Henry Vibart") as Sir James Alroyd
* [Douglas Munro](/wiki/Douglas_Munro_(actor) "Douglas Munro (actor)") as John Masters
* [Mary Brough](/wiki/Mary_Brough "Mary Brough") as Gloria Mott
* [John Turnbull](/wiki/John_Turnbull_(actor) "John Turnbull (actor)") as Willie Mott (as Stanley Turnbull)
* Gerard Hillier as Dick Honerton
* Gerald Annand as Crawley
* [Esme Hubbard](/wiki/Esme_Hubbard "Esme Hubbard") as Mrs. Heath
* James McWilliams as Clowes
* [Ernest Milton](/wiki/Ernest_Milton_(actor) "Ernest Milton (actor)") as Mr. Montague
* John R. Allan as Sam Brownley
